¼lM+d ifjogu vkSj jktekxZ foHkkx½ dh vf/klwpuk la[;k dk-vk- 2304¼v½] rkjh[k 29-09- 2008] tks Hkkjr ds jkti= ¼vlk/kkj.k½ Hkkx II] [k.M 3] mi&[k.M ¼ii½ esa izdkf”kr dh x;h Fkh] dks jn~n djrh gSA [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@755@lhvks@13&14@thlh@lksykiqj&egkjk"Vª@dukZVd lhek [k.M&chvksVh] vyds”k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi the 18th September, 2014 S.O. 2442(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby rescinds the Notification No. S.O. 2304(E), dated 29-09-2008 published in the Gazette of India , Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) of Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Shipping, Road Transport and Highways (Department of Road Transport and Highways) in view of the provisions in the Concession Agreement entered on 29-02-2012 between National Highways Authority of India and M/s. Solapur Tollways Private Limited for Four Laning of Solapur (km. 249.000)–Maharashtra/Karnataka Border (km. 348.800) Section of NH-9 in the State of Maharashtra under NHDP Phase-III on Design, Build, Finance, Operate and Transfer (DBFOT) basis. [F. No. NHAI/13013/755/CO/13-14/GC/Solapur- Maharashtra/Karnataka Border Section–BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
